title: Iro AI — site and product updates
description: Dated updates to the Iro AI website, machine-readable references, and SEO/LLM-SEO surface area.

items.title: Glossary, FAQ hub, changelog, and 5 new topic pages
items.content_text: New /glossary (DefinedTermSet), /faq hub, /changelog, and 5 new topic pages: AI for healthcare, AI for managers, AI job hunting, AI video generation, AI learning app for beginners. New machine-readable feeds: /iro.json, /manifest.json, /opensearch.xml, /humans.txt, /.well-known/security.txt. Markdown mirrors under /llms/.

items.title: Major LLM SEO pass
items.content_text: Expanded llms-full.txt with Q&A patterns, entity disambiguation, comparison table, pricing table, sample assistant prompts and ideal answers. Added /ai.txt, robots.txt entries for major AI crawlers, Speakable/WebPage/SearchAction/ItemList JSON-LD on the homepage, and new topic pages.

items.title: Initial llms-full.txt and expanded topic coverage
items.content_text: Introduced llms-full.txt. Added topic pages for Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, AI for marketing/students/work, AI automation course, iPhone learning, Iro vs video courses, AI course alternative. Explicit content-type headers for /llms.txt, /llms-full.txt, /sitemap.xml.

items.title: Duel gameplay video and quiz schemas
items.content_text: Added VideoObject schema for the homepage duel demo and Quiz schema for the AI IQ test.
